content: Chelsea play their first match post-Rosenior, while Arsenal try to rebound from a crushing loss in the Premier League title race. Julien Laurens makes his predictions.

zh.title: 周末预测：罗森尼奥离职能否阻止切尔西下滑？阿森纳的崩盘会继续吗？
zh.summary: 切尔西将面临经理罗森尼奥离职后的首场比赛，而阿森纳则试图从在争冠道路上的惨败中恢复。专家预测审视这些球队是否能扭转最近的下行趋势。

title: What's at stake in Europe's top soccer leagues: Titles, UCL qualification, relegation
summary: Europe's top soccer leagues feature intense competitions for major honors, Champions League qualification, and survival as the season reaches its critical phase. Multiple clubs across the continent battle for titles, European spots, and to avoid relegation.
content: How are the battles for major honors, Champions League spots and relegation shaping up across the continent?

zh.title: 欧洲顶级足球联赛的争夺:冠军、欧冠资格赛和降级
zh.summary: 随着赛季进入关键阶段，欧洲顶级足球联赛为重要荣誉、欧冠资格赛和生存而展开激烈竞争。大陆多家俱乐部为争夺冠军、欧洲席位和避免降级而展开角逐。

title: 'Panic on the streets of London': How Arsenal, Spurs fans can influence season finale
summary: As Arsenal and Spurs battle toward the season finale, fan anxiety in London is mounting, raising the question of whether emotional support can translate to on-field performance. The article explores the psychological impact of supporter sentiment during crucial matches.
content: It's the business end of the season and soccer fans are panicking, but does that impact players on the field?

zh.title: "伦敦街道上的恐慌":阿森纳和热刺球迷如何影响赛季末
zh.summary: 当阿森纳和热刺争夺赛季末胜利时，伦敦球迷的焦虑与日俱增，这引发了一个问题：情感支持是否能转化为球场上的表现。该文章探讨了在关键比赛中球迷情绪的心理影响。
